# cloudru-community_vpcs (Data Source)

Returns the list of VPCs available in the configured project.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `project_id` (String) Project ID to list VPCs for. Defaults to the provider project_id.

### Read-Only

- `vpcs` (Attributes List) List of VPCs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vpcs))

<a id="nestedatt--vpcs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vpcs`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `customer_id` (String) Customer (owner) identifier.
- `default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default VPC.
- `description` (String) VPC description.
- `id` (String) Unique VPC identifier.
- `name` (String) VPC name.
- `product_instance_id` (String) Product instance identifier.
- `project_id` (String) Project ID the VPC belongs to.
- `type` (String) VPC type (VPC_TYPE_CLIENT or VPC_TYPE_SERVICE).
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
